kept.text:
Good evening my X family 

First wave swapped out the branch.
Second wave will swap out the bank entirely.

With Revolut, Monzo, Chime, N26... we got apps rather than bank tellers.
Underneath? Same old rails, same delays, same power dynamics.

Enter the third wave.

No custodians.
No silent intermediaries.
No waiting for days for settlements.

 • Your balance, in your own wallet.
 •Native yields, not added features.
 •Cross-border transfers in seconds, not days.

This is not about crypto.
It is about programmable neo-finance.

As many are just getting a handle on v1…
Others are already well into v2.

Welcome to the next financial stack.
@useTria @MindoAI
